mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM system_menu m INNER JOIN system_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id AND rm.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN system_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id AND ur.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN system_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''
SELECT DISTINCT r.code FROM system_role r INNER JOIN system_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id AND ur.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 0
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM system_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = 0
